title: Samantha External API Surface — OpenAPI Spec, Versioning, Error Standards, API Keys, SDK
scope: Five foundational stories that establish the external developer API surface for the Samantha platform: an OpenAPI 3.1 spec covering all current REST endpoints, URL versioning via /v1/ path prefix, RFC 9457 Problem Details error format across all Go handlers, API key management (Postgres table + Go middleware + issuance/revoke endpoints), and runtime binding of the samantha.portfolio.fields.* SDK surface in app/lib/samantha.ts.
value: Samantha has no external developer API surface today — no machine-readable spec, no versioning contract, no third-party auth pathway, and an empty SDK stub. These five stories collectively unlock: Scalar documentation portal (fed from OpenAPI spec), SDK generation via Speakeasy or OpenAPI Generator, controlled breaking-change management via URL versioning, programmatic access for CI pipelines and integrations without a user JWT session, and the Phase 1 custom fields SDK for custom app developers. All five are zero-migration-cost changes — no external consumers exist yet, so this is the lowest-friction moment to act.
implementation_plan: Author OpenAPI 3.1 spec (openapi.yaml) covering all ~20 route groups; validate with redocly lint; update api-reference/ to render from spec
Add /v1/ chi group to backend/cmd/server/main.go for all external routes; update app/lib/api.ts base URL prefix; verify no 404s in dev
Create shared RFC 9457 error helper in Go; roll out across all handlers replacing ad-hoc JSON errors; update frontend API client error parser

Write migration for api_keys table (prefix, hash, scopes, rate_limit_config, expires_at, last_used_at, revoked_at, subscription_id); implement Go middleware; add padmin endpoints to issue/list/revoke keys
Implement samantha.portfolio.fields.* methods in app/lib/samantha.ts proxying to existing /api/artefacts/:type/* endpoints; add compile-time contract test at app/lib/samantha.contract.ts
areas_impacted: API: OpenAPI spec, URL versioning, error format, key issuance endpoints
Backend: Go handlers (error format rollout), auth middleware (API key validation), chi router (versioning)
Frontend: app/lib/api.ts (base URL), app/lib/samantha.ts (SDK binding), error display
Documentation: api-reference/ site updated to Scalar/spec-driven
feature_list: OpenAPI 3.1 spec for all Samantha REST endpoints
URL versioning (/v1/ path prefix on all external routes)
API key management (table + middleware + issuance/revoke endpoints)
samantha.portfolio.fields.* SDK runtime binding + contract test
features_extended: api-reference/ docs site — migrated from hand-written MDX to spec-driven Scalar or Redocly render
app/lib/samantha.ts — promoted from empty stub to live portfolio fields SDK
Go auth middleware — extended to support API key Bearer tokens alongside existing JWT

work_item_backlog.title: Write OpenAPI 3.1 spec for all Samantha REST endpoints
Add /v1/ URL prefix to all external Samantha routes
Standardise all handler errors to RFC 9457 Problem Details
API key management — schema, middleware, and key issuance

acceptance_criteria.proven_by: openapi.yaml passes redocly lint with zero errors covering all route groups
every handler in backend/cmd/server/main.go has a corresponding path entry with request/response schemas and documented auth requirements
api-reference/ site renders from the spec (Scalar or Redocly) — developers see accurate docs from a single authoritative source
all public REST routes in backend/cmd/server/main.go are mounted under /v1/ chi group; internal routes (healthz, ws, build-reconcile) remain at current paths
app/lib/api.ts prepends /v1/ to all external API calls and the app remains fully functional with no 404s in dev
all existing integration tests and dev server start cleanly with the new prefix; no handler returns 404 for a previously working route
every 4xx and 5xx response from any Go handler returns Content-Type: application/problem+json with type, title, status, detail, and instance fields
handlers returning 422 include a violations array with per-field { field, message } entries
app/lib/api.ts extracts RFC 9457 fields (title, detail, violations) for user-facing error display, replacing ad-hoc field lookups
migration adds api_keys table with prefix, hash, scopes, rate_limit_config, expires_at, last_used_at, revoked_at, subscription_id, created_at; applies cleanly to dev database

Go middleware validates Authorization: Bearer sam_live_<key> by hashing and prefix-lookup; rejects revoked/expired/unknown keys with RFC 9457 errors (401/403); integrates with chi router without conflicting with JWT middleware

padmin endpoints exist to issue (returns raw key once), list (prefix, scopes, expiry, last_used_at, revoked_at), and revoke by ID; key format is sam_live_<32-char-base62> for production, sam_test_<32-char-base62> for test
samantha.portfolio.fields.getSchema, getValue, getValues, setValue, setValues, and unwrap are implemented in app/lib/samantha.ts proxying to existing /api/artefacts/:type/* endpoints
all SDK calls are implicitly scoped to caller's subscription_id via existing backend JWT middleware; cross-tenant calls return 403
app/lib/samantha.contract.ts contains a compile-time contract test that TypeScript fails to compile if any samantha.portfolio.fields method signature diverges from docs/c_samantha_sdk_fields.md

risks.risk: /v1/ prefix rename requires updating every frontend fetch call — risk of missed call sites causing silent 404s
risks.mitigation: Grep all app/ files for /api/ before and after; run full dev smoke test; add temporary redirect middleware for /api/* → /v1/api/* during transition

risks.risk: API key middleware must not intercept JWT-authenticated routes — wrong middleware ordering causes auth regressions
risks.mitigation: Mount API key middleware only on routes explicitly opting in (separate chi group or per-route); JWT middleware remains primary; integration test both pathways

risks.risk: RFC 9457 error format rollout across all handlers is broad surface area — some handlers may be missed
risks.mitigation: Create shared Go error helper function; grep for w.WriteHeader and json.Encode error patterns before and after; add linting check for raw error writes

references.label: R043 — Samantha API Architecture, Tooling & Standards
RFC 9457 — Problem Details for HTTP APIs
